component.name: Material
component.variantProperty: Property 1 (Add Job Material `1283:426` omits the prefix)
component.description: Material line-item bottom sheet: vertical stack (`material-content`) with drag handle, body (back, header with wrench + title + optional SESSION row, subtitle, fields), and **Button** (`1287:1563`) **Material** colorway — **Primary Material** (`1808:1148`) / **Primary+Delete Material** (`1808:1154`) — in `material-primary-action` / `material-footer` (header wrench still **Semantic/Activity/Material**).

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Material (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.content: material-content (VERTICAL auto layout, 16px gap, sheet padding)
figmaLayerNames.title: material-title
figmaLayerNames.subtitle: material-subtitle

codeVariantMap.editJobMaterial: Add Job Material / Edit Job Material UX (`1283:426`)

fieldTypography.note: Inputs use `Typography/Body` (Ubuntu Sans Mono 14) per updated Figma fields, not `Typography/Input`.

notes: 2026-04-08: Fields + unit `select` use `typographyBodyStyle`. Footer CTAs now use shared Button (`1287:1563`); superseded: material-tint-only primary shadows.

2026-04-10: Renamed generic structural layers to kebab-case `material-*` slots (`material-content`, `material-header`, `material-title`, `material-session-pill`, `material-fields`, `material-price-row`, `material-unit-select`, `material-primary-action`, `material-footer`). Kept the variant property strings unchanged, and treated `Material` as a frame wrapper rather than a full component set. No `flatten()` was introduced in automation.
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `1283:351` — `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and all five variant masters. Canvas already uses kebab-case `material-*` (`material-content` stack, `material-drag-handle`, `material-body`, fields, actions). React: `material-content` is the padded vertical stack; pull bar `material-drag-handle` (replacing misapplied `material-content` on the handle); header matches Figma (`material-title-icon` + `material-title` / `material-title-text` for create; edit adds `material-title-row` with pill); `material-price-group` on $ + price inputs. No `flatten()` in automation.
2026-04-08: Footer CTAs use **Button** **Material** instances `1808:1148` / `1808:1154` from `1287:1563`. React: `FieldSoloCtaButton` (`materialPrimary` / `materialPrimaryWithDelete`).
